title: Rights and obligations of usufructuary not superseded
doc_html:
Art. 1428.  Rights and obligations of usufructuary not superseded

This Chapter does not supersede the provisions of this Code governing the rights and obligations of a usufructuary with respect to payment of estate debts.

Acts 1997, No. 1421, §1, eff. July 1, 1999.
